CustomField.formula: CASE( TECH_fournisseur__c, "Antargaz",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/antargaz.png","Antargaz", 50, 100), "Alterna",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/alterna.png","Alterna", 50, 100), "Dyneff",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/dyneff.png","Dyneff", 50, 100), "EDF Entreprises",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/edf.png","EDF Entreprises", 50, 100), "Ekwateur",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/ekwateur.png","Ekwateur", 50, 100), "Electricité de Provence",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/electricitedeprovence.png","Electricite de Provence", 50, 100), "Electricité de Strasbourg",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/electricitedestrasbourg.png","Electricite de Strasbourg", 50, 100), "Elmy",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/elmy.png","Elmy", 50, 100), "Endesa",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/endesa.png","Endesa", 50, 100), "Enercoop",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/enercoop.png","Enercoop", 50, 100), "Engie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/engie.png","Engie", 50, 100), "Eni",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/eni.png","Eni", 50, 100), "Enovos",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/enovos.png","Enovos", 50, 100), "Dalkia",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/dalkia.png","Dalkia", 50, 100), "Gaz de Bordeaux",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/gazdebordeaux.png","Gaz de Bordeaux", 50, 100), "Gaz Européen",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/gazeuropeen.png","Gaz Europeen", 50, 100), "Gazel Energie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/gazelenergie.png","Gazel Energie", 50, 100), "GEG",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/geg.png","GEG", 50, 100), "Iberdrola",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/iberdrola.png","Iberdrola", 50, 100), "La Bellenergie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/labellenergie.png","La Bellenergie", 50, 100), "LLUM",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/llum.png","LLUM", 50, 100), "MET Energie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/metenergie.png","MET Energie", 50, 100), "OHM Energie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/ohmenergie.png","OHM Energie", 50, 100), "Picoty",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/picoty.png","Picoty", 50, 100), "Planete OUI",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/planeteoui.png","Planete OUI", 50, 100), "Primeo Energie",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/primeoenergie.png","Primeo Energie", 50, 100), "Save energies",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/saveenergies.png","Save energies", 50, 100), "SEFE Energy",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/SEFE.png","SEFE Energy", 50, 100), "Situation Actuelle",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/Situation_Actuelle.png","Situation Actuelle", 50, 100), "Proposition Renouvellement", IMAGE("/resource/Logos/Proposition_Renouvellement.png","Proposition de renouvellement", 50, 100), "Selia",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/selia.png","Selia", 50, 100), "TotalEnergies",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/totalenergies.png","TotalEnergies", 50, 100), "Vattenfall",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/vattenfall.png","Vattenfall", 50, 100), "Ekivolt",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/ekivolt.png","Ekivolt", 50, 100), "Ilek",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/ilek.png","Ekivolt", 50, 100), "Hellio",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/hellio.png","Hellio", 50, 100), "Lucia",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/lucia.png","Lucia", 50, 100), "Proxelia",IMAGE("/resource/Logos/proxelia.png","Proxelia", 50, 100), "None")
CustomField.label: Logo du fournisseur
